ddls:
CREATE TABLE "demographic_data" (
  "demographic_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each demographic record */,
  "age" INTEGER /* Age of the individual */,
  "workclass" TEXT /* Work class of the individual (e.g., Private, Local-gov) */,
  "fnlwgt" INTEGER /* Final weight of the individual */,
  "education" TEXT /* Education level of the individual (e.g., 11th, HS-grad) */,
  "marital_status" TEXT /* Marital status of the individual (e.g., Never-married, Married-civ-spouse) */,
  "race" TEXT /* Race of the individual (e.g., Black, White) */,
  "gender" TEXT /* Gender of the individual (e.g., Male, Female) */,
  "native_country" TEXT /* Native country of the individual (e.g., United-States) */,
  "data_source_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for the data source */,
  "data_collection_date" TEXT /* Date when the data was collected */,
  "data_version" TEXT /* Version of the data */,
  "data_quality_score" REAL /* Score indicating the quality of the data */,
  "geographical_location" TEXT /* Geographical location of the individual */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("demographic_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_demographic_data_data_source_id FOREIGN KEY ("data_source_id") REFERENCES data_sources ("data_source_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_demographic_data_education FOREIGN KEY ("education") REFERENCES education_levels ("education_level"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_demographic_data_marital_status FOREIGN KEY ("marital_status") REFERENCES marital_statuses ("marital_status")
)

CREATE TABLE "employment_data" (
  "employment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each employment record */,
  "demographic_id" INTEGER /* ID of the demographic record the employment data belongs to */,
  "occupation" TEXT /* Occupation of the individual (e.g., Machine-op-inspct, Farming-fishing) */,
  "relationship" TEXT /* Relationship of the individual (e.g., Own-child, Husband) */,
  "hours_per_week" INTEGER /* Number of hours worked per week */,
  "income" TEXT /* Income level of the individual (e.g., <=50K, >50K) */,
  "data_source_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for the data source */,
  "data_collection_date" TEXT /* Date when the employment data was collected */,
  "data_version" TEXT /* Version of the employment data */,
  "employment_status" TEXT /* Employment status of the individual */,
  "industry" TEXT /* Industry in which the individual is employed */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("employment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_employment_data_occupation FOREIGN KEY ("occupation") REFERENCES occupations ("occupation"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_employment_data_data_source_id FOREIGN KEY ("data_source_id") REFERENCES data_sources ("data_source_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_employment_data_demographic_id FOREIGN KEY ("demographic_id") REFERENCES demographic_data ("demographic_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_employment_data_relationship FOREIGN KEY ("relationship") REFERENCES relationships ("relationship")
)

CREATE TABLE "education_levels" (
  "education_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each education level */,
  "education_level" TEXT /* Education level (e.g., 11th, HS-grad) */,
  "data_source_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for the data source */,
  "data_collection_date" TEXT /* Date when the education level data was collected */,
  "data_version" TEXT /* Version of the education level data */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("education_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_education_levels_data_source_id FOREIGN KEY ("data_source_id") REFERENCES data_sources ("data_source_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "marital_statuses" (
  "marital_status_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each marital status */,
  "marital_status" TEXT /* Marital status (e.g., Never-married, Married-civ-spouse) */,
  "data_source_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for the data source */,
  "data_collection_date" TEXT /* Date when the marital status data was collected */,
  "data_version" TEXT /* Version of the marital status data */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("marital_status_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_marital_statuses_data_source_id FOREIGN KEY ("data_source_id") REFERENCES data_sources ("data_source_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "occupations" (
  "occupation_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each occupation */,
  "occupation" TEXT /* Occupation (e.g., Machine-op-inspct, Farming-fishing) */,
  "data_source_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for the data source */,
  "data_collection_date" TEXT /* Date when the occupation data was collected */,
  "data_version" TEXT /* Version of the occupation data */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("occupation_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_occupations_data_source_id FOREIGN KEY ("data_source_id") REFERENCES data_sources ("data_source_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "relationships" (
  "relationship_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each relationship */,
  "relationship" TEXT /* Relationship (e.g., Own-child, Husband) */,
  "data_source_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for the data source */,
  "data_collection_date" TEXT /* Date when the relationship data was collected */,
  "data_version" TEXT /* Version of the relationship data */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("relationship_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_relationships_data_source_id FOREIGN KEY ("data_source_id") REFERENCES data_sources ("data_source_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., researcher, data analyst, admin) */,
  "password_hash" TEXT /* Hashed password of the user */,
  "last_login_date" TEXT /* Date of the last login */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Indicates whether the user account is active */,
  "permissions" TEXT /* List of permissions for the user */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date when the user account was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date when the user account was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "data_sources" (
  "data_source_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each data source */,
  "source_name" TEXT /* Name of the data source */,
  "source_description" TEXT /* Description of the data source */,
  "source_url" TEXT /* URL to the data source */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("data_source_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "datasets" (
  "dataset_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each dataset */,
  "dataset_name" TEXT /* Name of the dataset */,
  "dataset_type" TEXT /* Type of the dataset (e.g., demographic, employment) */,
  "data_collection_method" TEXT /* Method used to collect the data (e.g., survey, census) */,
  "data_collection_frequency" TEXT /* Frequency of data collection (e.g., monthly, annually) */,
  "data_source_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for the data source */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date when the dataset was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date when the dataset was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("dataset_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_datasets_data_source_id FOREIGN KEY ("data_source_id") REFERENCES data_sources ("data_source_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "data_versions" (
  "version_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each data version */,
  "dataset_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for the dataset */,
  "version_number" TEXT /* Version number of the dataset */,
  "version_description" TEXT /* Description of the changes in this version */,
  "version_date" TEXT /* Date when this version was created */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("version_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_data_versions_dataset_id FOREIGN KEY ("dataset_id") REFERENCES datasets ("dataset_id")
)
